summary: Phase 4 'Depth & Devotion' testing complete - All 34 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend features verified. New features: purpose-based starter templates (auto-seed events + items), recurring events (weekly/monthly with 90-day expansion), reactions on shared items (praying/amen/heart/thanks), Prayer Wall endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Purpose-based templates correctly seed events and items when creating tables with specific purposes (bible_study, family, community, friends, work)
Recurring events (weekly/monthly) are properly stored and expanded into virtual instances with ::rN id suffix and _virtual=true flag
Reactions system correctly initializes with empty arrays and toggles user IDs on add/remove
Prayer Wall endpoint correctly filters for prayer/intention types and hydrates reactions field
All Phase 1/2/3 endpoints still working (regression verified)
seed_data_creation: Phase4 Test Study table with bible_study purpose created with seeded template (Weekly Bible Study event + Our prayer list + This week's focus verse)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 complete. All features verified: (1) Purpose-based templates - bible_study seeds Weekly Bible Study (weekly) + Our prayer list (prayer) + This week's focus verse (intention); family seeds Family Dinner (weekly) + grateful intention; community seeds Monthly Potluck (monthly) + announcements note; friends seeds Saturday Hangout (weekly); work seeds Weekly Sync (weekly); other seeds nothing. (2) Recurring events - POST /api/events accepts recurring='weekly'|'monthly'|'none', GET /api/events expands recurring into virtual instances with ::rN suffix up to 90 days forward. (3) Reactions - POST /api/tables/{id}/items initializes reactions={praying:[], amen:[], heart:[], thanks:[]}, POST /react toggles user ID in array, returns {ok, action, reactions}, 422 for invalid type, 403 for non-members. (4) Prayer Wall - GET /api/tables/{id}/prayers returns prayer+intention items sorted newest first, hydrates reactions. (5) Frontend - TableView shows 'The Table' and 'Prayer Wall' tabs with count badge, PrayerWall renders cards with type badge + 4 reaction pills, NewEventModal has Repeats segmented control (Once/Weekly/Monthly), Upcoming Events shows ↻ weekly/monthly badge, Calendar shows recurring events on multiple dates.

backend_phase4.template_bible_study: POST /api/tables with purpose='bible_study' seeds Weekly Bible Study (weekly) + Our prayer list (prayer) + This week's focus verse (intention)
backend_phase4.template_family: POST /api/tables with purpose='family' seeds Family Dinner (weekly) + grateful intention
backend_phase4.template_community: POST /api/tables with purpose='community' seeds Monthly Potluck (monthly) + announcements note
backend_phase4.template_friends: POST /api/tables with purpose='friends' seeds Saturday Hangout (weekly)
backend_phase4.template_work: POST /api/tables with purpose='work' seeds Weekly Sync (weekly)
backend_phase4.recurring_weekly: POST /api/events accepts recurring='weekly', GET /api/events expands to ~12-13 instances over 90 days
backend_phase4.recurring_monthly: POST /api/events accepts recurring='monthly', GET /api/events expands to ~3 instances over 90 days
backend_phase4.reactions_init: POST /api/tables/{id}/items initializes reactions={praying:[], amen:[], heart:[], thanks:[]}
backend_phase4.reactions_add: POST /react adds user ID to reaction array, returns action='added'
backend_phase4.reactions_remove: POST /react same type again removes user ID (toggle), returns action='removed'
backend_phase4.reactions_membership: POST /react requires table membership (403 for non-members)

frontend_phase4.table_tabs: TableView shows 'The Table' (default) and 'Prayer Wall' tabs
frontend_phase4.prayer_wall_badge: Prayer Wall tab shows count badge of prayers+intentions
frontend_phase4.prayer_wall_cards: PrayerWall renders cards with type badge (Prayer purple / Intention yellow), name, body, shared_by + time ago
frontend_phase4.reaction_pills: 4 reaction buttons (Praying/Amen/Heart/Thanks) with icons and counts
frontend_phase4.reaction_toggle: Clicking reaction pill toggles highlight and count
frontend_phase4.recurring_badge: Upcoming Events card shows '↻ weekly' or '↻ monthly' badge
frontend_phase4.calendar_recurring: Calendar view shows recurring events on multiple dates

mocked_apis.walkie_audio: MOCKED - UI + beep only, no real audio streaming
mocked_apis.video_call: MOCKED - UI overlay only, no real WebRTC streams
mocked_apis.ai_suggestions: REAL - Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent Universal LLM key
